title: Shortcuts: add configurable 'N' parameter to export N days
description:
Shortcuts integration needs a way to configure an 'N' parameter to export N days of health data.

> Hi. I installed both apps, ios and android. I'm not able to auto-export either. The android app just fails, unless i export manually. The ios app doesnt seem to export if the phone's locked. Are there workarounds? Looking at the apple shortcuts app, I cant see a way to configure the actions, such as export N days of health data (how do i assign 'N'?)

Source: https://discord.com/channels/1443424100759634003/1498086744443326581/1500864719668641825
author: CodyBontecou
